required_skills: Large-Scale System Architecture and Technical Strategy
Engineering Excellence and Code Quality Stewardship
Distributed Systems Design and Trade-Off Analysis
Senior Engineer Mentorship and Leveling Guidance
Incident Leadership and Production Reliability Ownership
Technical Communication and Executive Stakeholder Alignment
preferred_skills: Open Source Project Leadership and Community Contribution
Platform and Internal Developer Tooling Strategy
Engineering Hiring and Technical Interview Program Design
Patent Authoring and Intellectual Property Development
Industry Conference Speaking and Thought Leadership
Build vs Buy Evaluation and Vendor Technical Assessment
Organizational Design and Engineering Team Structuring
responsibilities: Define and drive multi-year technical architecture strategy across multiple engineering teams, ensuring alignment with organizational business goals and scalability requirements
Author engineering-wide RFCs and Architecture Decision Records that evaluate design trade-offs, establish technical standards, and guide implementation decisions across the organization
Lead the design of complex, high-impact distributed systems with rigorous attention to consistency models, fault tolerance, observability, and operational cost efficiency
Identify and resolve systemic engineering quality issues by introducing new patterns, refactoring shared libraries, and retiring technical debt that impedes organizational velocity
Mentor and sponsor senior and principal-level engineers by providing structured technical feedback, career growth guidance, and stretch project sponsorship
Partner with engineering directors and product leadership to translate strategic business initiatives into phased technical delivery roadmaps with clear milestones and risk assessments
Lead organization-wide incident reviews for critical production failures, driving systemic remediation that prevents entire classes of future incidents across all product teams
Evaluate third-party platforms, open source frameworks, and cloud services through rigorous build-vs-buy analyses that weigh total cost of ownership, vendor risk, and integration complexity
Establish engineering excellence programs including internal tech talks, design review processes, and leveling rubrics that raise the technical bar across the entire engineering organization
Represent the engineering organization in cross-functional forums, executive business reviews, and external industry conferences as a credible technical authority and company spokesperson
